text: Hello, I'm Dr.
Jill.
Welcome to Let's Learn English with Anna.
We all share planet Earth, so we should all take care of it.
For example, I recycle.
How can you help the environment?
Today, Anna helps us answer the question, how can you help the environment?
Speaker 2: Our question is, how can you help the environment?
Thanks, Max.
How can I help the environment?
Well, last year I planted many trees.
When we plant trees, we help the environment.
Hmm, a plant is growing up my tree.
What is that plant?
When I do not know a plant, I find it on my phone app.
Hmm, is this a good plant or a bad plant for this area?
Bad vine.
Bad vine.
A vine?
When a vine grows in a tree, it can hurt the tree.
I should save my tree.
I should remove that vine.
No, I must save my tree.
I must remove that vine
Anna has an app on her phone.
It helps her identify plants.
She says, When I do not know a plant, I find it on my phone app.
The word when shows that two things happen close together in time.
It is like saying one thing happening usually leads to another thing happening.
Speaker 5: When I am tired, I rest.
Speaker 5: When I am hungry, I eat
Speaker 5: When I play soccer with my friends, I have fun.
There are many other ways to help the environment.
When we go a short distance, we can walk.
When a container is empty, we can reuse or recycle it.
Now let's hear from some friends.
They answer the question, how can you help the environment?
You can help the environment by cleaning up trash on the floor.
Speaker 6: I help the environment by riding my bike and recycling.
Speaker 6: Recycle as much as possible.
Speaker 7: I help the environment by recycling.
Great ideas!
Young people can help the environment in many ways.
We should all help.
When giving advice or suggestions, you can use the word should.
Next, Anna uses when and should together.
When you watch, you should listen carefully.
When you wash your face, you should turn off the water.
No!
I need to rinse my face!
When you wash your face, you should turn off the water.
When you leave a room.
You should turn off the lights.
I am still in the room.
When you leave a room
You should turn off the lights.
I'm going shopping!
When you go shopping, you should bring a bag
I have a lot of bags.
When you go shopping, you should bring a bag.
You should practice the English in this video.
It will help you talk about saving the planet.
I hope that vine did not hurt Anna's tree.
And join us again next time on Let's Learn English with Anna.
I did it!
I saved my tree!
But now I am dirty.
When you are dirty, you should take a bath
